title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 275.110 - Shares of stock nontransferable — exception
text:
275.110.  Shares of stock nontransferable — exception. — The shares of stock of associations shall be nontransferable, except from the original holder thereof, his heirs, executor, administrator, or legal representative, to the association as authorized in this chapter.
(RSMo 1939 § 14375) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 12717
